fields.label: Stripe Price ID
fields.name: stripe_price_id
fields.instructions: The Price ID from the Stripe Dashboard (starts with price_). Auto-populated by the pull-products sync command.

fields.label: Stripe Product ID
fields.name: stripe_product_id
fields.instructions: The Product ID from Stripe (starts with prod_). Auto-populated by the pull-products sync command.

fields.label: Display Price
fields.name: price
fields.instructions: Display price shown on the storefront. Stripe is the source of truth for the actual charge. Auto-populated by sync.

fields.label: SKU
fields.name: sku
fields.instructions: Optional stock-keeping unit for internal tracking.

fields.label: Stock Quantity
fields.name: stock_quantity
fields.instructions: Number of units available. Decremented automatically on successful payment.
